CVE-2026-25707.title: A relative path traversal bug problem when processing repository  ...
CVE-2026-25707.description: A relative path traversal bug problem when processing repository metadata in libzypp before 17.38.10 could be used by remote attackers supplying repositories to overwrite files on the system, leading to denial of service or privilege escalation.

CVE-2026-44942.title: A path traversal in handling the "path" component of .repo files  ...
CVE-2026-44942.description: A path traversal in handling the "path" component of .repo files processed by libzypp before 17.38.13 in the 17.x series, or before 16.22.19 could be used by attackers to fill directories on the system outside of the zypp cache with content.
